feedback.text: We call for the protection of digital rights for purchased content from unauthorised disconnection. Consumers who lawfully purchase digital products such as e-books, music, films or software must be guaranteed access to this content on a permanent basis. Providers shall not arbitrarily block access or delete content after it has been paid for. We are committed to legislation that ensures that purchased digital goods remain permanently usable, regardless of platform changes or business decisions. Protect women’s rights in the digital age!
